arts.ttl: 'The ROAR!' | Delap opens the scoring for Ipswich!
arts.sum: Liam Delap opens the scoring for Ipswich Town against Aston Villa!

arts.ttl: Jamie Redknapp's gushing tribute to Unai Emery after Arsenal debacle as he dubs Aston Villa star 'a revelation'
arts.sum: Former Villa player Ashley Young, alongside Redknapp today, explained how Emery wanted to put his stamp on the club quickly after taking over from Steven Gerrard . Players want to be educated about how to get better and he’s certainly one of those managers.”

arts.ttl: Aston Villa handed John McGinn injury blow as he's given news he was dreading
arts.sum: The Villans face Bayern Munich in the Champions League in midweek after Sunday's meeting with Ipswich Town, but captain McGinn won't be available to face the German giants

arts.ttl: Ipswich v Villa team news: Bailey starts, Szmodics benched
arts.sum: Gameweek 6 continues at Portman Road The post Ipswich v Villa team news: Bailey starts, Szmodics benched appeared first on Best FPL Tips, Advice, Team News, Picks, and Statistics from Fantasy Football Scout.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa team news: Who has replaced John McGinn against Ipswich Town?
arts.sum: Unai Emery makes one change to his Aston Villa XI for Sunday's Premier League game at Ipswich Town.

arts.ttl: Key Aston Villa coach leaves role due to family illness
arts.sum: Aston Villa set-piece coach Austin MacPhee has stepped down from his role with the Scotland national team. We will be sending the latest breaking news and top Villa stories directly to the WhatsApp community and we want you to be part of it.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa team news vs Ipswich Town confirmed as Unai Emery names starting XI
arts.sum: Villa starting XI: Martinez, Konsa, Carlos, Pau, Digne, Onana, Tielemans, Bailey, Ramsey, Rogers, Watkins. Aston Villa manager Unai Emery has named his starting XI to face Ipswich Town in the Premier League this afternoon (2pm).

arts.ttl: Town won't let external noise distract them from big Portman Road clash against Villa
arts.oTtl: East Anglican Daily Times - Ispwich Town FC
arts.sum: Liverpool are the only side to beat Ipswich in a league match at Portman Road in the last 12 months (Image: Steve Waller) For example, after facing Liverpool and Manchester City in their opening two games, Ipswich would have been forgiven if they couldn’t match the tempo against Fulham, but they played with an incredible intensity that could have given them all three points on another day.

arts.ttl: Ipswich Town vs Aston Villa LIVE match updates and team news from Portman Road
arts.sum: Aston Villa take on Ipswich Town at Portman Road this afternoon as Unai Emery's side go in search of their fifth Premier League win of the season. Only once in their league history have Villa opened a season with three away wins, a feat which they could achieve this afternoon after defeating West Ham on the opening weekend before beating Leicester 2-1 at the end of August.

arts.ttl: Pundit rails against Aston Villa Champions League kit decision
arts.sum: Villa roared to a superb 3-0 away win at Young Boys in Bern last week and are now preparing for what Samuel dubbed in today's Sunday Times as a the "Champions League tie of the week" on Wednesday at home against Bayern Munich and "an echo of their European Cup final win in 1982". But Samuel had been stirred by this week's Subbuteo World Cup to take up a complaint with Villa over their call to wear a change kit rather than claret and blue.
